title: SSB Odisha Librarian Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 225 Posts
org: State Selection Board, Department of Higher Education, Odisha
shortInfo: The latest State Selection Board Odisha Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Librarian posts in Non-Govt. Aided Colleges! Published at ssbodisha.ac.in, this new recruitment drive offers 225 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the 21-42 years age group (with relaxations) and possessing Bachelor Degree in Library Science can apply online from 27-04-2026 to 30-05-2026. Find all details about the SSB Odisha Librarian new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, online form, and notification PDF here.

basic_details.job_title: SSB Odisha Librarian Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 225 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: State Selection Board, Department of Higher Education, Odisha
basic_details.short_information: The latest State Selection Board Odisha Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Librarian posts in Non-Govt. Aided Colleges! Published at ssbodisha.ac.in, this new recruitment drive offers 225 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the 21-42 years age group (with relaxations) and possessing Bachelor Degree in Library Science can apply online from 27-04-2026 to 30-05-2026. Find all details about the SSB Odisha Librarian new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, online form, and notification PDF here.

application_fee.details: For General / SEBC: ₹500/- For SC / ST / PwD: ₹200/-

age_limit.details: Minimum 21 years and maximum 42 years as on 01.01.2026 (i.e., born not earlier than 01.01.1984 and not later than 01.01.2005).

qualification.details: Nationality: Candidate must be a citizen of India and a domicile of the State of Odisha. | Librarian | Other Eligibility Conditions: | Must be a citizen of India and a domicile of the State of Odisha. Must be able to speak, read and write Odia and have passed Odia as a language subject in H.S.C. or equivalent (or passed M.E. standard Odia test). Candidates with qualifications from outside Odisha must produce equivalence and affiliation certificates. Government servants (temporary or permanent) must produce No Objection Certificate from their employer before document verification.

salary_details.pay scale: Level 9 of Pay Matrix under ORSP Rules, 2017
salary_details.additional benefits: Allowances as applicable under Odisha government rules
salary_details.details: Pay scale as per ORSP Rules, 2017 (Group B, Level 9).

selection_process: The selection of candidates will be made solely on the basis of a Written Test.

100 Multiple-Choice Questions (MCQs) Duration: 2 hours Marking: 1.5 marks for every correct answer; 0.5 marks deducted for every incorrect answer Questions will be based on the syllabus available on the SSB website and answered on carbonless OMR sheets. Qualifying Marks: 40% for UR category and 30% for SC / ST / SEBC / PwD categories. In case of tie in marks
aggregate percentage in Graduation / equivalent examination will be considered; further tie broken by date of birth (earlier born candidate selected).
how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must apply online only. The step-by-step process is as follows:
Step 1 - Visit Official Website: Log on to www.ssbodisha.ac.in.
Step 2 - Read Instructions: Go through the detailed instructions and advertisement before filling the form.
Step 3 - Register / Apply Online: Click on the link for “Recruitment to the post of Librarian” and fill the online application form carefully.
Step 4 - Upload Documents: Upload latest passport size photograph, scanned signature and left-hand thumb impression.
Step 5 - Pay Application Fee: Pay the required fee online through the designated payment gateway.
Step 6 - Submit & Print: Submit the application and take a printout of the confirmation page / application form for future reference.
Note: No edit option is available after final submission. Candidates are advised to apply well before the closing date to avoid last-minute technical issues.
important_instructions: Read the detailed advertisement carefully before filling the online application. Upload correct Photograph, Signature and Thumb Impression as per specifications. No documents to be uploaded at the time of application; originals to be produced at document verification stage. Keep registered mobile number and email active till completion of the recruitment process. Application fee once paid will not be refunded. SSB Odisha reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process without assigning any reason.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in SSB Odisha Librarian Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: State Selection Board, Odisha has announced 225 Librarian (Group B, Level 9) vacancies in Non‑Govt. Aided Colleges, out of which 67 posts are reserved for women.

faq.question: Q2. What are the application dates for SSB Odisha Librarian 2026?
faq.answer: The online application starts on 27 April 2026 at 2:30 PM and the last date to apply and pay fee online is 30 May 2026 up to 11:45 PM.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for SSB Odisha Librarian posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Bachelor Degree in Library Science or an equivalent degree from a recognised institution. Degrees obtained from outside Odisha must be supported with equivalence/affiliation certificates wherever required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for SSB Odisha Librarian Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applicants must be 21 to 42 years as on 01.01.2026 (born not earlier than 01.01.1984 and not later than 01.01.2005). Upper‑age relaxations: 5 years for SC/ST/SEBC/Women/Ex‑Servicemen, 10 years for PwD (40% and above), and 15 years for PwD belonging to SC/ST/SEBC.

faq.question: Q5. Is domicile of Odisha compulsory for SSB Odisha Librarian 2026?
faq.answer: Yes. The candidate must be a citizen of India and a domicile of the State of Odisha, and must be able to read, write and speak Odia, having passed Odia as a language subject in HSC / equivalent or ME‑standard Odia test.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for SSB Odisha Librarian Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹500 for General and SEBC candidates and ₹200 for SC, ST and PwD candidates, payable only through online mode within the application window.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process and exam pattern for SSB Odisha Librarian 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is purely based on a Written Test of 150 marks, consisting of 100 MCQs (1.5 marks each) of 2 hours duration. There is negative marking of 0.5 marks for each wrong answer. Minimum qualifying marks are 40% for UR and 30% for SC/ST/SEBC/PwD candidates.

faq.question: Q8. How are ties in marks resolved in SSB Odisha Librarian merit list?
faq.answer: If two or more candidates secure the same written test marks, the tie is resolved first by higher aggregate percentage in Graduation/equivalent, and if still tied, by date of birth, giving preference to the older candidate.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply online for SSB Odisha Librarian Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Visit ssbodisha.ac.in, open the link “Recruitment to the post of Librarian”, fill the online application form, upload recent photograph, scanned signature and left‑hand thumb impression, pay the prescribed fee online, and finally submit and print the application for future reference. No offline form is accepted and no edits are allowed after final submission.

faq.question: Q10. What is the pay scale and service conditions for SSB Odisha Librarian posts?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be appointed as Librarian (Group B, Level 9) under ORSP Rules, 2017, with Level‑9 pay in the Odisha Pay Matrix and admissible allowances as per Odisha Government rules; probation and other service conditions will be as per prevailing government regulations.
